queries.question: What are the start dates of life insurance products that have a payout of 50,000 and what are the start dates of annuity products that have the same payout?
queries.sql:
SELECT Insurance_Products.StartDate 
FROM Insurance_Products
WHERE (Insurance_Products.ProductType = "Life Insurance" OR Insurance_Products.ProductType = "Annuity") AND Insurance_Products.Payout = 50000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?startdate WHERE {
  ?insurance_products a :Insurance_Products .
  ?insurance_products p:StartDate ?startdate .
  ?insurance_products p:ProductType ?producttype_w .
  ?insurance_products p:ProductType ?producttype_w2 .
  ?insurance_products p:Payout ?payout_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?producttype_w) = "Life Insurance" || STR(?producttype_w2) = "Annuity")) && (STR(?payout_w) = "50000" || STR(?payout_w) = "50000.0")))
}

queries.question: List all start dates of life insurance products combined with the start dates of annuity products with a payout of 50,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Insurance_Products.StartDate 
FROM Insurance_Products
WHERE Insurance_Products.ProductType = "Life Insurance" OR Insurance_Products.ProductType = "Annuity" AND Insurance_Products.Payout = 50000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?startdate WHERE {
  ?insurance_products a :Insurance_Products .
  ?insurance_products p:StartDate ?startdate .
  ?insurance_products p:ProductType ?producttype_w .
  ?insurance_products p:ProductType ?producttype_w2 .
  ?insurance_products p:Payout ?payout_w .
  FILTER((STR(?producttype_w) = "Life Insurance" || (STR(?producttype_w2) = "Annuity" && (STR(?payout_w) = "50000" || STR(?payout_w) = "50000.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me start dates of life insurances and annuities products with a payout of 50,000.
